description: The study of people in their own context. Participant observation, thick description, seeing a community as it sees itself. The discipline that insists you can't understand a person without inhabiting their world.

dome_relevance.8: Community — understanding social fabric from the inside
dome_relevance.10: Autonomy — seeing self-determination as communities define it
dome_relevance.12: Flourishing — understanding what flourishing means to THESE people, not to the system

sphere_relevance.5: Social — deep understanding of who lives here and how
sphere_relevance.6: Temporal — oral history, community memory, lived time
sphere_relevance.7: Activation — designing for actual needs, not assumed ones
